summary: V68.6/V68.7 Sovereign Lattice Scout Audit - Full E2E verification. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified - MiniLattice SVG renders, Share Resonance Pattern works, public share page accessible, invalid share_id shows 404.

integration_issues.issue: Page shows error boundary text in console detection but actually loads correctly (screenshot shows working Tesseract UI). The 401 errors in console are from unauthenticated API calls during initial page load before token is applied.

critical_code_review_comments: ROUTE_TO_COORD mapping in sovereign_main_brain.py correctly maps all routes to 9x9 lattice coordinates
activate_node_for_route() correctly handles workshop/* routes via deterministic hash to RELAY ring
Client-side debounce (ACTIVATE_DEBOUNCE_MS=5000) in useImmersionPresence.js prevents rapid-fire ghost nodes
Presence tick rate-limiting (55s minimum) working correctly server-side
Share pattern uses stable sha1-based share_id (idempotent)
dust_events backfill verified in quantum.py (shadow_collapse), dimensions.py (phase_shift), cosmic_map.py (harvest, power_spot)
MiniLattice.js correctly implements PHI-weighted opacity (1/(1+distance/PHI)) for inner-ring brightness
1.618s pulse animation on current node working

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows verified, minor console 401s during page load)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with prior activations
context_for_next_testing_agent: V68.6/V68.7 features fully verified: (1) POST /api/main-brain/activate returns correct coord/type/charge/resonance for mapped routes, activated=false for unmapped routes, 400 for empty path. (2) GET /api/main-brain/user-lattice returns 9x9 flat array with unique_nodes_visited matching non-null cells. (3) GET /api/main-brain/route-map returns full mapping dict. (4) POST /api/presence/tick grants +5 dust +2 sparks with 55s rate-limit. (5) GET /api/share/pattern returns stable sha1-based share_id. (6) GET /api/share/pattern/public/{id} works without auth. (7) Client-side debounce verified in useImmersionPresence.js. (8) MiniLattice SVG renders with PHI-weighted opacity and 1.618s pulse. (9) ResonanceShare.js public page shows rank pill, 9x9 SVG, sparks count, 'BEGIN YOUR OWN JOURNEY' button.
